('Alert for ' + app) : 'Notification'), body: msg || (app ? ('Application ' + app + ' sent a notification.') : 'Notification received.'), severity: mapSeverity(b.severity, status === 'DOWN' ? 'success' : 'info'), source: source || 'generic-webhook' }; if (url) { out.url = url; out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'Open Details'; } return out; } if (status === 'UP' || status === 'DOWN') { const up = status === 'UP'; const out = { title: (up ? '🟢 UP' : '🔴 DOWN') + ' Uptime Monitor', body: 'App: ' + (app || 'Unknown monitor') + (url ? ('\nApp URL: ' + url) : ''), severity: up ? 'success' : 'critical', source: source || 'status-cake' }; if (url) { out.url = url; out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'App URL'; } return out; } const out = { title: app ? ('Alert for ' + app) : 'Notification', body: msg || 'Notification received.', severity: 'info', source: source || 'generic-webhook' }; if (url) { out.url = url; out.urlLabel = b.urlLabel || 'Open Details'; } return out; })() }}
